conservative.name: Scorching Flames
conservative.requirements: Not engaged with target. Target within medium range. Must have some source of fire

success.description: You spew forth a violent jet of searing flames, inflicting normal damage
As above, and the attack inflicts 1 wound to all the target's allies within close range of the target

boon.description: All targets injured by the attack suffer 1 fatigue
All targets injured by the attack suffer 1 stress
Ignore the primary target's soak value from armour against this attack

reckless.name: Scorching Flames
reckless.requirements:
Used By: Flamer of Tzeentch
Not engaged with target. Target within medium range. Must have some source of fire

success.description: The gibbering Flamer of Tzeentch spews forth a violent jet of searing flames, inflicting normal damage
As above, and the attack inflicts 1 wound to all the target's allies within close range of the target

boon.description: All targets injured by the attack suffer 1 fatigue
All targets injured by the attack suffer 1 stress
The primary target suffers 1 fatigue each time a recharge token is removed from this action

chaosStar.description: The Flamer of Tzeentch suffers 1 critical wound
